title: Chapter 302
content:
Chapter 302: Chapter 302 : Max Level Unlocked (Dick Nearly Didn’t Survive)

Right now both Jax and Sianna were exhausted, dizzy, and sleeping not so peacefully on a pile of things that should not be used as a bed.

The past twenty-four hours had gone wilder than the dire beasts roaming the area. Jax had humbled every single creature that dared to interrupt his farming session.

He carved fear into the eyes of the very beasts that were supposed to be the apex predators of this territory. And those who still thought of Jax as beneath them ended up becoming his carpet. His mattress. His furniture.

A dire Griffin. A dire Behemoth. A Hydra. And many more oversized nightmares were now laid across the ground with a few of their limbs missing. And on top of this soft pile of defeated monsters stood the evidence of how Jax and Sianna had spent the last day and night. Continuously. Relentlessly. On top of a mountain of bodies that would make people piss themselves just from looking.

The full night went to fucking. Until sunrise. And then what came after sunrise? More fucking.

The only thing time managed to change was the pile around them and the holes of Sianna, which were not looking to be in any condition a healer would describe as "normal."

The pounding directions were clearly visible through her pulsing, wrecked pussy. And even her asshole while she slept was telling the same story. The soft pink lining of her rectum had slipped out slightly, a glistening bulge blooming from her stretched hole that throbbed in rhythm with her heavy breaths.

Her bunny set was torn from everywhere. Her hanging tits were swelled up and veiny from continuous punishment. Her ass and neck carried the same story in bruises and bite marks.

Right now her pussy and asshole felt empty. Incomplete. As if something was missing. Because for the past twenty-four hours his dick had mostly not left them. And the cold late-night breeze was the only comfort those swollen holes were getting.

Jax was in terrible shape too. He laid on the beast platform while struggling with the burning itch in his red, swollen dick. Dehydration, sweating, dizziness, everything was hitting him at once. And the pain in his cock from overpushing his body’s limit was making him want to shove it into anything cold just for relief.

So he grabbed the upper half of a Lamia from the pile. A half-snake monster he had severed clean in two when the jealous creature saw Sianna getting all the attention and decided to attack her mid-session. Protective Jax had split the thing in half without even pulling out.

And right now, seeing her dead mouth hanging open and radiating a cold breeze from whatever frozen mana still lingered in her serpentine body, Jax’s instincts took over. He shoved his burning dick inside the Lamia’s mouth just to cool the pain down.

He didn’t know his eagerness, his hunger for points would have this much of an effect on his body. But here he was. Laying upside down on a pile of dead monsters with a severed snake woman’s mouth as his personal ice pack.

And then he just slept like that. Dick resting in a dead Lamia’s mouth. On a cliff and under the stars.

The only real rest they had taken was in the afternoon when the sound of their stomachs roaring became louder than the impact or thrusting sounds. So Jax went to fetch food from the camp.

Even gentleman Jax fed Sianna with his own hands. At first he thought she was throwing tantrums by refusing to eat. But after giving her a direct order and seeing no movement, he realized she wasn’t being stubborn. She physically couldn’t sit up. Her lower body was completely done for.

So he fed her. Gave her water. Then brought a healing potion that restored enough of her strength to function.

And then he showered her with love again.

Fucked her pussy while pinning her against a tree. Positioned her upside down so she was hanging by gripping the teeth of a dead Griffin while he pounded her asshole from behind. The whole day passed in wicked and humiliating positions as Jax played with her like a toy to farm every single point he needed.

Their screams and lovely moments echoed through the entire cliff until even the surviving beasts in the area were too embarrassed to make their own mating calls.

Back to the present. Late night.

Jax was barely keeping his eyes open. The moon had returned to its place above the cliff and the cold air was biting at his exposed skin. While struggling to stay conscious, he was operating his system.

[Total Devotion Points: 6,002]

The moment that six thousand mark hit, Jax had pulled out and sighed in relief. Because it was enough for what he needed.

He navigated through his system until he reached the shop. Scrolled until his eyes found the item he had been dreaming about.

[LEVEL UP ENHANCEMENT]

[Description: Instantly increases Host’s level by 1. Stackable.]

[Price: 100 DP]

The fifty percent limited discount had been removed long before and at that time Jax stopped looking at this item. It was an instant cheat for the game and there would have been no fun in using it. But now he had no choice. The world was turning against him. He needed to be strong enough to show all of them their place.

So he chose.

[Purchase: Level Up Enhancement x60]

[Total Cost: 6,000 DP]

[Confirm? YES / NO]

’Just do it.’

[PURCHASE CONFIRMED]

[LEVEL UP: 40 → 41]

[LEVEL UP: 41 → 42]

[LEVEL UP: 42 → 43]

The notifications didn’t stop.

[LEVEL UP: 56 → 57]

[LEVEL UP: 71 → 72]

[LEVEL UP: 88 → 89]

Until finally.

[LEVEL UP: 99 → 100]

[LEVEL UP COMPLETE]

With a grin that used the last bit of energy his face had left, he opened his status screen.

[CHAMPION STATUS: JAX RAYNE]

[LEVEL: 100 / 100] [MAX]

[HP: 200,000 / 200,000]

[MP: 20,000 / 20,000]

[EXPERIENCE: 1,000,300 / ∞]

(Host has reached maximum level. Most attributes have hit their max limit along with HP and MP. However, certain attributes such as reflexes, IQ, and others can continue to grow with additional experience.)

Jax could barely read the numbers through his half-shut eyes. But he felt the satisfaction deep in his bones. His hard work paid off. Those big numbers were his now.

He just slept. In victory.

Sianna was not waiting for him to fall asleep. She was waiting for the clock. For the twenty-four-hour mark to pass. It hadn’t been a complete twenty-four hours since Jax had released her the moment he hit his minimum points.

And when the binding sigil glowed one final time on her chest before fading away, Sianna smiled.

She started to rise. Her muscles screamed the moment she raised her upper body. Her legs weren’t working properly. She couldn’t feel anything below her waist. But her revenge was dragging her forward. Pulling her body toward him despite every nerve begging her to stay down.

Toward his sword. Which stood tall, pierced through the skull of the Behemoth.

She reached it. Wrapped her trembling hands around the hilt. And pulled it free.

Then she crawled toward him. Slowly. Each movement sending agony through her wrecked body. His cum still leaking from her pussy and her asshole with every shift of her hips, leaving a trail on the beast pile beneath her that made her blood boil even hotter.

She reached his back. Raised the sword above his head. Aimed for the skull.

And brought it down.
